claim_text: Howeverclinicalimpactisseverelylimitedbytheshort2-min 15 O half-life17,18,19 . [18 F] DASA-23 is a novel complementary PET tracer having significant potential for targeting other aspects of metabolic reprograming; this tracer binds to pyruvate kinase M2, an isoform overexpressed in some tumors, which serves to enhance biosynthesis in support of cellular proliferation20,21,22 .
